highlights.text: Library — owned games, play time, recent sessions
Achievements — per-game progress and global unlock rates
Friends — list, online status, profile summaries
Store — search catalog, game details, news feeds
Market — real-time item prices and inventory
Stats — player counts, global achievement stats

readme:
### What it does

Steam Games gives your AI agent read-only access to the Steam platform — your game library, achievements, friends, store catalog, market prices, and player statistics.

Your agent can check your play time across games, compare achievement progress, see which friends are online, look up game details in the store, check current market prices for items, and monitor player counts.

### Token efficiency

Steam’s API returns verbose JSON with deeply nested structures. Each tool includes a concise formatter that extracts only the fields that matter. A library listing returns game name, play time, and last played — not the full API payload with redundant image URLs and internal metadata.

### Safety model

All 12 tools are **read-only**. Steam deprecated its chat messaging API, so there are no write operations. Your agent can explore your entire Steam presence without any risk of side effects.

API key auth is trivial to set up — register at `steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey` with any Steam account that has purchase history.

### Tool coverage

| Category | Tools | What you can do |
|----------|-------|-----------------|
| Profile | 1 | Player summary, avatar, status |
| Library | 3 | Owned games, recent games, game details |
| Achievements | 1 | Per-game achievement progress |
| Social | 1 | Friends list with status |
| Store | 3 | Search catalog, game news, global stats |
| Market | 2 | Item prices, inventory |
| Live | 1 | Current player counts |

scenarios.label: Review your gaming stats and achievements
scenarios.body: List your game library sorted by play time, check achievement completion for your most-played games, and compare global unlock rates to see which achievements are rare.

scenarios.label: Research a game before buying
scenarios.body: Search the Steam catalog for a game, check its details and recent news, then look at current player counts to gauge how active the community is.

scenarios.label: Check market prices for inventory items
scenarios.body: Browse your Steam inventory, look up current market prices for tradeable items, and identify valuable items worth listing.

certification.security_notes: API key auth. Read-only. No write operations. Per-endpoint rate limiting.

notes: Steam Web API MCP with Storefront API for catalog search. API key auth (trivial setup). Covers player summaries, achievements, owned games, friends, presence, store data, market prices. Steam deprecated chat messaging — no gated operations.
